S.FORM: Kinshasa hya' ga cyux maki' Tay 4°19′54″S 15°18′50″E na The Democratic Republic of the Congo.
S.PHON: kins~ɕħas~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ********s~ɕ *********e na tħe *emoʦ~ʨratiʦ~ʨ repuβliʦ~ʨ o* tħe ʦ~ʨoŋo.
